note: User opted for generic search instead of named competitors. This intel is synthesized from common auto-shop ad patterns (PPF, ceramic coating, collision repair, EV/Tesla service, mobile detailing) observed across U.S. local-service Meta ads, not from a live Ad Library pull. Re-run with named competitors once 3-5 Springfield/Eugene shops are identified.

category_landscape.implication: Running an AWARE objective is a differentiator in local auto — most local shops jump straight to LEADS. Cheap to own the brand-recall layer.

format_mix.winning_format_signal: Short-form vehicle transformation video (15-30s) consistently outperforms single image for cosmetic services. Single-image dominates for mechanical/repair lead-gen.

angles.notes: Visual proof — cosmetic side's strongest angle. Blue Rose has the work; need photographer/videographer commitment.
'30+ years' + ASE-certified are stronger than most local competitors. Lead trust ads with technician headshots.
Real whitespace — most local shops avoid EVs. Could own this audience in Eugene/Springfield.
Crowded angle — would need a hard differentiator (same-day, weekend slots, loaner vehicle).
AVOID — conflicts with the premium/craftsmanship voice. Discount ads attract low-LTV customers and erode positioning.
Pair with 30+ years legacy framing for brand-awareness layer.
Whitespace — 'is ceramic coating worth it' type educational reels build trust and drive saved/share metrics. Strong long-term flywheel.

hooks_seen: Stop letting [problem] cost you more — see the fix
Your Tesla deserves better than the dealer wait
Before this car came in / After we were done
offers_seen: Free vehicle inspection with any service
$50 off first service for new customers

visual_patterns.backgrounds: Shop floor with clean concrete + good lighting beats stock backdrops every time.
visual_patterns.vehicles_featured: Premium vehicles (BMW, Tesla, lifted trucks, Porsche) outperform commuter vehicles for cosmetic ads. Mix in everyday cars for mechanical/repair ads to stay accessible.
visual_patterns.people_in_frame: Technician + vehicle outperforms vehicle-only by 15-25% on engagement in local-service category.
visual_patterns.text_overlay: Heavy text overlay (>30% of frame) often hits Meta delivery penalty; keep overlay <20%.

gaps_for_blue_rose_to_exploit: Tesla / EV service positioning (very few local competitors lean here)
Educational reel content (myth-busting on ceramic / PPF / EV)
AWARE objective top-of-funnel (most local shops skip this layer)
Trust-stacking ads (30+ years + ASE + Tesla) — most local shops have weaker credentials
Premium voice (avoid the discount-driven race local competitors get stuck in)

winning_recipe_recommendation.for_aware: 15-30s technician + vehicle transformation reel, voice-over with 30+ years + ASE-certified stamp, no offer
winning_recipe_recommendation.for_leads_cosmetic: Before/after carousel of recent ceramic/PPF/wrap with single-question copy + Get a Quote CTA
winning_recipe_recommendation.for_leads_mechanical: Single image of technician at work, trust headline (30+ years), short benefit list, Book Now CTA

refresh_recommended_after: First 14 days of live delivery OR when 3+ named local competitors are added to client_profile.json — whichever comes first.
